title: allium carinatum var. violaceum
intro: Allium carinatum var. violaceum, also known as the keel-flowered onion or violacy allium, is a perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its ability to exhibit antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. Allium carinatum var. violaceum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from its flowers, leaves, or bulbs.
